fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Firecrawl -> Dashboard -> API Keys. Required for all scrape, crawl, and extract endpoints.

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.helpText: Defaults to the Firecrawl cloud endpoint. Override for self-hosted deployments.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via the team credit-usage endpoint

metadata.summary: Firecrawl agent-friendly web crawling API. Converts any URL into clean markdown or structured JSON, handles JS-rendered sites, and respects robots.txt. Distinct from desktop_browser in that it runs in the cloud with no local headless browser dependency.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign up at firecrawl.dev and note your free credit allowance
2. Go to Dashboard -> API Keys and create a new key (format: fc-...)
3. Paste the key here

Key endpoints your agents will use:
- POST /v1/scrape -- single-page extraction to markdown or structured data
- POST /v1/crawl -- multi-page crawl with depth and path filters
- POST /v1/extract -- schema-driven structured extraction across pages
